name: ABERRANT LEFT PULMONARY ARTERY
definition: LEFT PULMONARY ARTERY SLING = ANOMALOUS ORIGIN OF LEFT PULMONARY ARTERY
dominant_finding: "inverted-T" appearance of mainstem bronchi = horizontal course ← lower origin of right
distribution: anterior bowing of right mainstem bronchus
discriminating_features: "inverted-T" appearance of mainstem bronchi = horizontal course ← lower origin of right
anterior bowing of right mainstem bronchus
"carrot-shaped trachea" = narrowing of tracheal diameter in caudad direction resulting in
obstructive emphysema / atelectasis of RUL + LUL

general: "inverted-T" appearance of mainstem bronchi = horizontal course ← lower origin of right
anterior bowing of right mainstem bronchus
"carrot-shaped trachea" = narrowing of tracheal diameter in caudad direction resulting in
obstructive emphysema / atelectasis of RUL + LUL
separation of trachea + esophagus at hilum by soft-tissue mass
